series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes the oaths of office, surety bonds and supporting materials for certain state officials, including the Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Treasurer of State, Auditor of State, Deputy Auditor of State, Attorney General, First Assistant Attorney General, and other employees as designated by the Attorney General.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for eight (8) years. State Archives to review records prior to dispostion, then may destroy., Paper: Shred
